content:
# Final Pipeline Design: RAUNE-Net + Depth-LUT + Global HSL + Depth Grading (2026-04-01)

## Pipeline Architecture

### One-Time Setup (per scene, ~30s for 3 keyframes on CPU)
1. RAUNE-Net inference on N keyframes (36.7M params)
2. Build depth-stratified 33^3 LUTs from all keyframes (σ=0, NN fill, gentle object weighting edge=0.3 contrast=0.3)
3. Derive global HSL qualifier corrections (6-vector DaVinci-style) from keyframe LUT-vs-RAUNE residual

### Per-Frame Pipeline (~1.2s at 1024px CPU)
4. Depth estimation (Depth Anything V2 — already in pipeline)
5. Apply depth-stratified LUT (depth-aware color correction via blended 5-zone LUTs)
6. Apply global HSL correction (6 color qualifiers: Red/Skin, Yellow, Green, Cyan, Blue, Magenta)
7. Per-frame depth-aware ambiance grading (shadow lift, S-curve, highlight compress, clarity, warmth, vibrance — all depth-graduated)

### Key Design Decisions
- **No Gaussian smoothing on LUT** — σ=0, trilinear interpolation already smooths
- **Nearest-neighbor fill** for empty LUT cells — not identity
- **No ambiance compensation** — was actively harmful (pixel mask mismatch bug)
- **Global HSL over depth-segmented HSL** — global pools more pixels, produces stabler corrections, better diver hue accuracy (+0.7° vs +10° for depth-segmented)
- **Object-importance weighting** in LUT build: gentle (0.3 edge, 0.3 contrast), ~5x subject/bg ratio

### Quality Metrics (avg delta vs full RAUNE-Net pipeline)
- Hue: +0.3° (excellent)
- Saturation: -0.004
- R/G: -0.007
- Noise: -6pp (less noise than full pipeline)
- Per-object diver hue (frame 02): +0.7°
- Background water hue: +1.8°

### HSL Qualifier Corrections (typical values)
| Qualifier | H offset | S ratio |
|-----------|----------|---------|
| Blue (dominant) | -0.96° | 1.105 |
| Cyan | -2.91° | 1.066 |
| Red/Skin | -1.25° | 1.236 |
| Yellow | +4.41° | 1.194 |

### 4K Video Strategy
- RAUNE-Net: keyframes only (not per-frame)
- Depth estimation: per-frame at proxy resolution, upscale
- LUT apply: could use ffmpeg lut3d filter or GPU shader (near-free)
- HSL correction: cheap per-pixel math
- Depth grading: numpy at proxy, or GPU compute shader
- Bottleneck at 4K: depth grading (LAB conversion + gaussian_filter)

### Irreducible Limitations
- ~9° per-pixel hue error floor from spatial averaging (RAUNE-Net's attention context cannot be captured in any LUT)
- Global metrics hide per-object variation (diver accurate on frame 02 but 10° off on frame 01 — content-dependent)
- LUT coverage: only 6-8% of 33^3 cells populated from underwater footage color gamut
